steps.title: Find the exponential pattern
steps.content: Use the exponential form $y=a\cdot b^x$. The table starts at $867$, so $a=867$. The values increase by about $0.4%$ each step, so the multiplier is $b=1.004$. The model is $$y=867(1.004)^x.$$

steps.title: Match the model to the choices
steps.content: The question uses $t$ and $n$ instead of $x$ and $y$, so $y=867(1.004)^x$ becomes $n=867(1.004)^t$. Since $1.004=1+0.004$, this is $n=867(1+0.004)^t$. That confirms B is correct.
